title: This Qualcomm Analyst Turns Bearish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Monday
summary: A Qualcomm analyst at Seaport Global downgraded QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) from Neutral to Sell, setting a $100 price target. This report also details four other significant downgrades for Monday, including Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE), KinderCare Learning Companies Inc (NYSE: KLC), National Grid Plc (NYSE: NGG), and Incyte Corp (NASDAQ: INCY), with respective analysts revising their ratings and price targets.

title: Cadence Design Systems Shares Sold by Gotham Asset Management
summary: Gotham Asset Management LLC reduced its holdings in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CDNS) by 8.8% in the third quarter of 2026, selling 10,852 shares. This brings their total holdings to 111,882 shares, valued at approximately $39.3 million. The reduction in holdings could indicate a shift in investor sentiment, even though institutional ownership remains high at 84.85%.

title: BTIG Upgrades Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) to Buy
summary: BTIG has upgraded Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) to a Buy rating with a price target of $43.00, citing the company's recent bank application announcement which addresses key downside risks related to private credit exposure. The analyst believes Upstart's current share price does not reflect the potential upside from becoming a bank and is overly pricing in liquidity risk. The upgrade is also driven by significant potential cost savings, downside protection in liquidity-drying scenarios, and the expansion of the customer base through a unified regulatory framework.

title: Bank of Nova Scotia Boosts Cadence Design Systems Stake
summary: Bank of Nova Scotia has increased its stake in Cadence Design Systems by 24.5% during the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 181,948 shares valued at approximately $63.9 million. This move indicates the Canadian financial institution's confidence in the electronic design automation software provider's long-term value and growth prospects. Cadence Design Systems is a crucial supplier of tools for semiconductor and electronics industries, making it a strategic investment for Bank of Nova Scotia.

title: Leverage Shares 2X Long ADBE Daily ETF (ADBG) ETF Holders - Institutional Ownership
summary: This article from GuruFocus provides an overview of the Leverage Shares 2X Long ADBE Daily ETF (ADBG), including its current stock price, performance metrics, and a note on the absence of institutional ownership data without a premium membership. It indicates no available data for top holdings, institutional ownership, or guru trades related to ADBG. The page encourages users to sign up for a free trial to access this information and participate in discussions.

title: Atreides Management Reduces Stake in Lumentum Holdings
summary: Atreides Management LP has significantly reduced its stake in Lumentum Holdings Inc. by 62.6% in the third quarter, selling 1,100,601 shares. The hedge fund now holds 656,960 shares, representing a 2.1% stake and making it the 12th largest institutional investor. This move could signal a shift in investor sentiment regarding Lumentum or the broader technology sector.

title: Bridgefront Capital Trims Stake in Western Digital
summary: Bridgefront Capital LLC reduced its holdings in Western Digital Corporation by 41.8% during the third quarter, dropping its ownership to 9,348 shares valued at $1,122,000. This move reflects broader trends as institutional investors closely monitor the performance and outlook of major players within the data storage industry. The reduction in stake highlights ongoing shifts and volatility in the sector.

title: Can ServiceNow Actually Beat AI? Its CEO Says Yes.
summary: ServiceNow's CEO, Bill McDermott, believes the company is resilient to AI disruption because it orchestrates over 80 billion enterprise workflows annually, handling the "last-mile" execution that AI cannot. Despite a 25% year-to-date stock decline due to fears of AI making SaaS obsolete, JPMorgan agrees, labeling ServiceNow as "AI-resilient" due to its role as a connective tissue integrating AI insights into actionable processes. However, the article cautions that while ServiceNow may beat AI in the short term, the rapid pace of AI advancement means that long-term resilience is uncertain.

title: Coatue Management Trims Stake in Cadence Design Systems
summary: Coatue Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ: CDNS) by 33.3% during the third quarter of 2026, selling 235,725 shares and bringing its total holdings to 472,212 shares. This move reflects a cautious outlook by some investors on the EDA software market amidst stock volatility, despite Cadence Design Systems remaining a dominant industry player with long-term growth potential.

title: 44 Wealth Management LLC Acquires Shares of 15,635 eBay Inc.
summary: 44 Wealth Management LLC has acquired a new stake of 15,635 shares in eBay Inc. during the third quarter, valued at approximately $1,422,000. This purchase, submitted to the SEC, signifies the institutional investor's confidence in eBay's growth potential as a leading e-commerce platform. The transaction reflects a new investment in one of the largest online marketplaces.

title: Can Pega’s New AI “Vibe Coding” Tools Redefine Its Workflow Automation Edge for Investors (PEGA)?
summary: Pegasystems has enhanced its Pega Blueprint with a "vibe coding" experience, using conversational AI for app design while maintaining governance and security. This, coupled with Forrester's endorsement as a leader in customer service solutions, aims to make complex enterprise automation more accessible. The article examines how these new AI tools could bolster Pega's investment narrative focused on AI-driven workflow automation.

title: Infinera Corp Stock (ISIN: US45667G1031) Faces Uncertainty Post-Nokia Acquisition Integration
summary: Infinera Corp stock is currently trading around $6.64 as Nokia Oyj integrates its recent acquisition, positioning Infinera's technology within Nokia's optical networking portfolio. Despite a recent earnings miss, analysts maintain a Hold rating with limited upside potential, citing broader sector pressures and ongoing losses. The acquisition aims to leverage Infinera's coherent optics for high-speed data transmission in AI-driven data centers and 5G infrastructure, making it indirectly relevant for European investors tracking Nokia's performance.

title: D-Wave vs. IonQ Isn’t the Only Quantum Battle — Here’s the Real Race
summary: This article compares the differing strategies and recent earnings of quantum computing companies D-Wave (QBTS) and IonQ (IONQ). D-Wave focuses on monetizing near-term optimization solutions for enterprises while expanding into gate-model computing, reporting strong bookings growth despite lower current revenue. IonQ, pursuing a full-stack platform strategy with significant revenue growth and acquisitions like SkyWater Technology, aims to dominate the future of quantum computing.

title: A Look At Fair Isaac’s Valuation As VantageScore Pressure Rises And US$1b Senior Notes Are Issued
summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) is under increased scrutiny due to rising competition from VantageScore in U.S. mortgages and its recent US$1 billion senior notes issuance. While a popular narrative suggests FICO is undervalued at $1,971 per share, driven by SaaS transition and strong market position, its current P/E ratio of 40.8x is higher than industry and peer averages, indicating a potentially limited margin for error. Investors are advised to consider competitive risks and funding strategies alongside growth potential.

title: Wedbush Sticks to Its Buy Rating for Rubrik, Inc. Class A (RBRK)
summary: Wedbush maintained a Buy rating for Rubrik, Inc. Class A (RBRK) with a $90.00 price target, aligning with Goldman Sachs's Buy rating, despite OpenAI reiterating a Hold. The company reported quarterly revenue of $377.68 million and a GAAP net loss of $86.97 million, an improvement from the previous year. Corporate insider sentiment is negative, with increased selling of RBRK shares over the last quarter, including a significant sale by Director Ravi Mhatre in December 2025.

title: Morgan Stanley says Fed risks are skewed towards later and more cuts
summary: Morgan Stanley suggests that the Federal Reserve's policy path is likely to involve rate cuts occurring later than anticipated, but potentially being larger in magnitude. The firm expects core inflation to slow from Q2 despite strong Q1 readings, due to fading tariff impacts and slowing shelter inflation. Consequently, Morgan Stanley foresees two rate cuts this year, with clearer evidence of disinflation needed before the easing cycle begins.

title: Adobe to Offer $75 Million in Free Services to Settle Government Lawsuit
summary: Adobe Inc. has agreed to pay approximately $150 million to settle a complaint from U.S. regulators regarding the difficulty consumers faced in canceling their subscriptions. The settlement allocates $75 million for free services to affected customers, with the remaining amount going to the U.S. Department of Justice. Adobe announced the settlement on Friday, March 13, 2026.

title: Goldman Sachs Reaffirms Their Buy Rating on Rubrik, Inc. Class A (RBRK)
summary: Goldman Sachs analyst Matthew Martino has reiterated a Buy rating for Rubrik, Inc. Class A (RBRK) with an $82.00 price target, following the company's recent earnings report. Rubrik reported a quarterly revenue of $350.17 million and a GAAP net loss of $63.83 million. Despite positive analyst ratings, corporate insider sentiment remains negative, with an increase in share sales over the past quarter.

title: Thematics Asset Management Reduces Stake in Cadence Design Systems
summary: Thematics Asset Management reduced its stake in Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) by selling 17,491 shares, representing a 10.6% decrease in the third quarter. The firm now owns 146,965 shares, valued at $51.6 million, making it their fourth largest holding. This move is significant as Cadence is a key player in electronic design automation, and changes in institutional ownership can signal shifts in market sentiment regarding the company's future performance.

title: Adobe Inc. $ADBE Shares Sold by M&T Bank Corp
summary: M&T Bank Corp decreased its stake in Adobe Inc. by 13.9% in the third quarter, selling 16,913 shares and retaining 104,397 shares valued at $36.83 million. Despite Adobe exceeding Q1 revenue and EPS estimates with strong AI-led growth, the company faces near-term challenges including a $150 million DOJ settlement and CEO Shantanu Narayen's planned departure, which have led to analyst downgrades. Other institutional investors like Ossiam and Marathon Capital Management have adjusted their positions, with hedge funds collectively owning 81.79% of the company's stock.

title: ATMP SEC Filings - Barclays ETN+ Select MLP 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Barclays ETN+ Select MLP (ATMP) SEC filings, including annual, quarterly, and material event reports. It highlights that ATMP is an unsecured debt obligation of Barclays Bank PLC, whose regulatory reports (like 6-K forms) are crucial for assessing the issuer's creditworthiness. The platform offers AI-powered summaries to simplify complex regulatory language and provides real-time updates of new filings.

title: Progyny issues notice of settlement for derivative action regarding director pay
summary: Progyny, Inc. (NASDAQ:PGNY) announced a settlement agreement for a derivative action concerning its historical compensation practices for non-employee directors. The legal challenge, filed in New York, addresses past compensation arrangements. The company filed the notice as an exhibit to its Form 8-K with the SEC, though specific settlement terms were not disclosed.

title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Rubrik, Inc. Class A (RBRK), Adobe (ADBE) and ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN)
summary: Analysts have provided new ratings for several technology companies. Rubrik, Inc. Class A (RBRK) received a Buy rating from Barclays and CIBC, with a strong buy consensus. Adobe (ADBE) was rated Sell by KeyBanc, though the overall consensus is Hold. ServiceTitan, Inc. Class A (TTAN) received a Buy rating from KeyBanc and Piper Sandler, with a strong buy consensus from the street.

title: Lee Eugene I Jr buys Portillo’s (PTLO) shares worth $1.48 million
summary: Lee Eugene I Jr., a director at Portillo's Inc. (NASDAQ:PTLO), recently purchased 286,000 shares of the company's Class A common stock for $1.48 million. This acquisition occurred when the stock was trading near its 52-week low, and an InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued. The purchase follows strong Q4 2025 earnings for Portillo's, which exceeded analyst expectations.

title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slip As Higher For Longer Rate Worries Build
summary: US stock futures, including S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 contracts, are down due to new inflation data and concerns about sustained high borrowing costs. Consumer prices rose 0.3% in February and 2.4% annually, with core inflation at 2.5%, keeping the 10-year US Treasury yield around 4.24%. This "higher for longer" interest rate environment is particularly impacting rate-sensitive sectors like small-cap stocks and real estate.

title: A Look At Kennedy-Wilson (KW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Kennedy-Wilson Holdings (KW) recently saw a share price rebound, with a 30-day return of 9.03% and a 1-year return over 30%, despite negative 3 and 5-year returns. The company closed at US$10.87 with annual revenue of US$542.5m and a net loss of US$38.8m. Analysts have a consensus price target of $9.9, suggesting the stock is currently 20.8% overvalued against a fair value estimate of $9.00.

title: Adobe has agreed to a $150M Settlement to Resolve Allegations of Hiding Fees & Preventing Consumers from Easily Cancelling Software Subscriptions
summary: Adobe has agreed to a $150 million settlement with the Department of Justice and the FTC, comprising $75 million in civil penalties and $75 million in free services for customers. This resolves allegations that Adobe deceived consumers by hiding early termination fees for its subscription plans and making cancellation processes difficult. The settlement also mandates clearer disclosures about fees and simpler cancellation methods for future subscriptions.

title: Adobe Tumbles 8% Despite Record Earnings as CEO Announces Departure
summary: Adobe (ADBE) stock fell 8% despite reporting record Q1 FY2026 revenue of $6.4 billion, due to concerns over CEO Shantanu Narayen's announced departure after 18 years and lower-than-expected Q2 non-GAAP EPS guidance. This leadership uncertainty and profit outlook overshadowed the strong financial results, adding to an ongoing selloff fueled by persistent market questions about Adobe's defense against AI competition. Investors are also weighing a trademark infringement lawsuit and the stock's underperformance against the broader tech sector, with the future direction heavily dependent on the upcoming CEO appointment.

title: What To Expect From Nvidia’s GTC—the So-Called ‘Woodstock of AI'
summary: Nvidia's GPU Technology Conference (GTC) is set to begin, where the company is expected to unveil new products and platform details, including potential updates on future chips and an AI agent platform called "NemoClaw." CEO Jensen Huang will deliver a keynote address. Analysts are watching to see if Nvidia can impress investors, especially given a weak start to the year for its stock and cautious sentiment around other AI stocks.

title: Adobe agrees to pay $150 million to resolve alleged violations of online shopper law
summary: Adobe Inc. has agreed to pay $150 million and accept an injunction to settle allegations from the U.S. Justice Department. The settlement addresses claims that the software firm’s subscription practices violated the Restore Online Shoppers' Confidence Act. This agreement was announced on Friday, March 13, 2026.

title: Street Fighter II gear expansion sees Turtle Beach Corp debut Victrix Pro KO Fight Stick
summary: Turtle Beach Corp has launched new gaming accessories inspired by "Street Fighter II: Champion Edition." These include the Victrix Pro KO Leverless Fight Stick and a Victrix Tournament Backpack, targeting both long-time fans and competitive players. This release is part of Turtle Beach's continuous strategy to deliver innovative gaming hardware and expand through branded collaborations.

title: Moody’s cuts WPP rating on weak earnings and high leverage
summary: Moody's Ratings has downgraded WPP Plc to Baa3 from Baa2, citing continued pressure on operating performance and elevated leverage. This decision reflects WPP's underperformance compared to peers, a 5.4% decline in revenue (less pass-through costs) in 2025, and an expected gross debt/EBITDA ratio between 4.2x and 4.5x over the next year. The stable outlook anticipates gradual operational improvement from 2027, driven by strategic transformation and cost savings.

title: Adobe Settles With U.S. Over Hard-to-Cancel Subscriptions
summary: Adobe has agreed to pay $75 million to the U.S. Justice Department and provide $75 million in free services to customers to settle a lawsuit. The suit accused the company of making it difficult for users to cancel subscriptions to products like Photoshop and hiding expensive cancellation fees. This settlement is part of a broader trend by the Trump administration to resolve consumer protection lawsuits initiated under the Biden administration.

title: Dollar General, Bumble And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
summary: This article highlights five stocks—Dollar General, Northern Oil And Gas, DICK'S Sporting Goods, Bumble, and Adobe Inc.—to watch on Thursday, March 14, 2026. It details their upcoming or recent earnings reports, revenue expectations, and their respective stock movements in after-hours trading based on analyst and company announcements.

title: Open Lending (LPRO) Posts $0.01 EPS Profit in Q4 as Revenue Surges 133.9% YoY to $19.3M
summary: Open Lending (LPRO) reported a return to profitability in Q4 2025 with $0.01 EPS, a significant improvement from a $1.21 loss in the prior year, as revenue normalized to $19.3 million. Despite this, analyst caution persists, with the stock trading significantly below its 52-week high. The market is awaiting Q1 2026 results to determine the sustainability of this profitability.

title: 20 software stocks under pressure as Adobe's decline weighs on sector
summary: Software stocks are facing pressure following Adobe's recent earnings report, which led to a significant decline in its share price. This underperformance from Adobe has caused investors to rotate away from parts of the technology sector, impacting numerous other software companies. The article highlights 20 software stocks that are currently experiencing this downward trend.

title: Barclays Bank PLC
summary: Barclays Bank PLC has filed a pricing supplement for $2,300,000 Market Linked Securities that are callable with a contingent coupon and contingent downside principal at risk. These securities are linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100 Index, Russell 2000 Index, and EURO STOXX 50 Index, maturing on September 14, 2029. Investors face potential loss of principal if the lowest performing index falls below a certain threshold, and returns are capped by contingent coupon payments.

title: Adobe CEO steps down after 18 years
summary: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen is stepping down after 18 years, having overseen record revenue of $6.4 billion in the first quarter. He will remain Chairman while a successor is sought. Analysts note that the new CEO will need to navigate the challenges and opportunities presented by AI advancements to maintain Adobe's market position.

title: Vipshop (VIPS) Stock Price, News & Analysis $VIPS
summary: Vipshop Holdings Limited (NYSE:VIPS) is a Chinese online discount retailer specializing in flash sales of branded products. The company currently trades at $16.02, has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $20.65, and pays a 3.00% dividend yield. Recent news includes its Q4 2025 earnings report and discussions around its dividend hike and share buyback program.

title: Why DigitalOcean Holdings (DOCN) Is Up 23.0% After Powering Workato’s Next-Gen Enterprise AI Agents
summary: DigitalOcean Holdings (DOCN) saw a 23.0% increase after announcing that Workato’s AI Research Lab is using its inference-optimized platform for next-gen enterprise AI agents, leveraging NVIDIA Hopper GPUs to achieve faster, more cost-effective results. This collaboration highlights DigitalOcean's growing role in AI infrastructure, reinforcing its efforts to build a comprehensive AI platform despite ongoing challenges in competition and capital intensity. The article notes that analysts’ revenue growth forecasts for DigitalOcean vary widely, emphasizing the importance of diverse perspectives on its AI-driven upside.

title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Adobe, Micron, Western Digital, Coinbase, Ulta Beauty, CF Industries, and More
summary: Stocks, including Adobe, Micron, Western Digital, Coinbase, Ulta Beauty, and CF Industries, showed movement on Friday. The market experienced an upturn as oil prices dropped and new personal consumption expenditures data indicated a slight increase in inflation during February. This article highlights the key movers of the day amidst these economic indicators.

title: Guggenheim cuts Adicet Bio stock price target to $100 on valuation
summary: Guggenheim has reduced its price target for Adicet Bio Inc. (NASDAQ:ACET) to $100 from $128, while maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment comes as the stock trades significantly lower, reflecting the volatility inherent in clinical-stage biotechnology companies, despite strong enrollment momentum in its Phase 1 clinical trials for prula-cel across multiple autoimmune indications. The company anticipates key clinical updates and regulatory filings throughout 2026, alongside a recent 1-for-16 reverse stock split to comply with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement.

title: Douglas Elliman (DOUG) Reports Q4 Adjusted Loss of $0.17/Share on $245.4M Revenue
summary: Douglas Elliman (DOUG) reported a Q4 adjusted loss of $0.17 per share on $245.4 million in revenue. Despite a flat revenue, the company achieved GAAP earnings of $0.68 per share due to one-time gains. The adjusted EBITDA was $10.6 million, with a gross profit of $48.1 million and an operating income of $67 million.

title: Will Strong Q4 Beat And Acquisition Capacity Shift National Health Investors' (NHI) Narrative
summary: National Health Investors (NHI) reported a strong Q4 2025 performance, exceeding revenue expectations, which highlights its capacity for future acquisitions without stressing its balance sheet. This positive financial standing and acquisition potential are key to its investment narrative, though risks related to execution and senior housing occupancy remain. The company's affirmed dividend commitment signals confidence in its cash generation and capital allocation strategies.

title: Adobe presents solid Q, but slightly slowing ARR prompts largest intraday drop in year: analysts
summary: Adobe's first-quarter results, while demonstrating that AI is not hurting its business, still led to a significant intraday stock drop due to investor fears over slightly slowing Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR). Analysts acknowledged positive AI product traction and revenue growth but reduced price targets, citing uncertainty about future ARR re-acceleration and leadership changes.

title: Philip Morris vs. British American Tobacco: Which Tobacco Giant Wins for Income Investors?
summary: This article compares Philip Morris International (PM) and British American Tobacco (BTI) for income investors, highlighting their recent full-year 2025 results. Philip Morris demonstrates strong growth in smoke-free products, commanding a higher valuation due to consistent earnings, while British American Tobacco offers a higher dividend yield and lower valuation despite a more volatile earnings history. The choice between the two depends on whether an investor prioritizes growth and consistent earnings or pure yield and a cheaper valuation.

title: Sema4.ai Announces Semantic Layer Capabilities at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026
summary: Sema4.ai has unveiled its Semantic Layer capabilities at the Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026, revolutionizing how AI agents interact with enterprise data. This innovation allows business users to query structured and unstructured data, including databases, documents, and spreadsheets, using natural language without requiring SQL expertise. The new Semantic Layer aims to democratize data access, eliminate bottlenecks, and provide mathematically accurate analysis across diverse data sources.

title: Adobe to pay $75 million to resolve US lawsuit over fees, subscription cancellations
summary: Adobe has agreed to pay $75 million to settle a U.S. government lawsuit that accused the company of concealing termination fees and making subscription cancellations difficult. In addition to the monetary payment, Adobe will provide $75 million in free services to customers. The company stated that it has streamlined its sign-up and cancellation processes and denied any wrongdoing.

title: Assessing Catalyst Pharmaceuticals (CPRX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Catalyst Pharmaceuticals (CPRX) has experienced recent share price weakness, trading at $23.39, but still shows a strong 1-year return of 12.07% and significant 5-year gains. The company appears undervalued with a P/E ratio of 13.3x, lower than the industry average, and a discounted cash flow (DCF) model suggesting a fair value of $63.70 per share. This analysis indicates a potential undervaluation for the rare disease specialist, offering an opportunity for investors after the recent dip.

title: FTAI Aviation To Rally More Than 43%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
summary: This article compiles recent analyst rating changes and price target adjustments for ten different companies, including Adobe, ServiceTitan, KinderCare Learning Companies, and FTAI Aviation. Analysts have issued upgrades, downgrades, and modified price targets based on their outlooks for these firms. Notably, BTIG raised its price target for FTAI Aviation to $340, suggesting a significant rally.
